Text.Page: Do you see that castanic over there? Deigan?<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"Sure."</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>

He's following me around like a lovesick popori. He won't make a move, he just...lingers.

I don't have time for games. If he's too cowardly to go after what he wants, he can kiss a gula.

Get rid of him for me, would you? Insult him, humiliate him, whatever it takes.

What? I'm no coward! I'm just...taking my time.

Besides, look at this bone! No coward could snatch that from a foe.

Give her my bone. That ought to shut her up.

What a moron. I'm not impressed by bones. Any idiot can kill an ossugon.

Sorry you got wrapped up in this, .
